positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of a majestic woodland creature—a fox curled within geometric emerald foliage, surrounded by abstract constellations of glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and dew-covered ferns. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern digital linocut, featuring sharp, clean silhouettes and strong contrast between deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, sapphire) and pops of ethereal gold and milky white luminescence. Composition must be centered and balanced, designed for seamless repetition on apparel, with clear lines and maximum readability. Perfect for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, grainy, blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, bad anatomy, out of frame, extra limbs, noise, chromatic aberration
